globalRules.turnCycleDefinition: One full round back to the same player; starts at the beginning of a player's turn.
globalRules.durationExpirationDefault: Beginning of the start player's turn after the specified turn cycles complete.
alchemyNotes: Promo cards are isolated in their own source pack so future promo uploads can be added without touching Gen 1/2/3 base source files.
Modifier is separate from Atk. Modifier adds to both Hit Roll and Attack Damage Roll.
Atk adds only to Attack Damage Roll.
Field detection is separated from Magic Type. Magic Type is Standard/Infinite/Lightning; Magic Subtype is None/Equip/Field.

cards.name: Aqua Dragon
cards.text: During battle, add +2 attack dice rolls to this creature if it battles with a "Demon", "Steam", "Humanoid", or "Beast" type creature.

condition.text: Battling a Demon, Humanoid, Beast, or Steam-named creature

effects.notes: Steam is not a standard rules-guide creature type, so this is modeled as a name filter for Steam-named creatures.

cards.notes: Pre-order promo. Steam condition modeled as name contains Steam.

cards.name: Dragon of Time
cards.text: During your turn, roll a die. If the result is: (1-2) Magic cards cannot be played this turn. (3-4) Negate all creature effects this turn. (Aside from this card) (5-6) All Limited Summons are sent to their original owner’s cemetery.

effects.target: All players / all creatures / all Limited Summons

cards.name: Moon Owl
cards.text: If this card is removed from the field by your opponent, it’s instead equipped to your opponent’s primary creature as a magic card. The equipped creature loses 10 HP at the beginning of each of their turns. Return this card to the original owner’s deck if the equipped creature is removed from the field.
